history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. A safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go downward through column B, so I should first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there advances along the safe path toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor, and moving there brings me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava in column C above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I should not move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I need to turn left from facing down to facing right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is safe floor, and moving forward advances me toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column D is the goal, so moving forward will reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
